_note: PLACEHOLDER Twi translations for demo purposes. Have a native Twi speaker / veterinary translator review before production use.

ui.title: Hwɛ Wo Nkokɔ Yare (Check Your Bird's Sickness)
ui.upload_prompt: Fa wo akokɔ mfoni gu ha (Upload your bird's photo here)
ui.quarantine_label: Ɛsɛ sɛ wode no si nkyɛn anaa?

quarantine_yes: Aane - fa no si nkyɛn ntɛm (Yes - isolate it immediately)
